short_blurb: Fire-zone roofing for La Cañada Flintridge foothill homes.
local_note: La Cañada Flintridge's foothill location puts most properties in Very High Fire Hazard Severity Zones. Chapter 7A compliance, Class A assemblies, ember-resistant venting, and enclosed eaves are all required. We install these assemblies regularly and understand the local building department's requirements.
